## Meeting purpose

[Discuss onboarding process and scaling content operations](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [This was an initial onboarding meeting to align expectations and processes](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Marcel's team is setting up systems and processes to scale content operations rapidly](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [They are building out a freelance network and hiring process to augment their core team](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [A key bottleneck is the concurrent user limit on their main software account](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Process

  - [Marcel sees the onboarding as valuable for setting expectations with the client](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Addressing any "red flags" or misaligned expectations early on](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

### Scaling Operations

  - [Marcel's team is setting up systems to scale content operations quickly](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [This includes an applicant tracking system, skills testing, freelancer vetting](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [They are ready to hire weekly and leverage freelancers for specific tasks like keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

### Introducing New Team Member

  - [Marcel brought on Jimmy to help handle increased demand](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Jimmy may become a partner and is already managing some accounts](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [This allows Marcel to focus more on workflows, sales, marketing](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Software Limitations

  - [Their main software account has a concurrent user limit of 3, which is a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [They need to increase this limit to enable scaling](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel will follow up regarding getting a separate software instance for this client](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Reach out to the vendor about increasing the concurrent user limit on their main account](https://fathom.video/share/hyDcVZqip9xeXjFvbLz4fASBuD2LfhqB?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
